raw_response:
{
  "current_life_events": "After the school science fair, his project was overlooked by the judges and he was ridiculed by classmates, which left him feeling embarrassed. He has a midterm exam next week and a group project due, adding to his workload. He hasn't slept well for the past two nights because he keeps replaying the criticism in his head.",
  "mental_state": "Feeling a mix of embarrassment and frustration, he doubts his academic abilities and worries about how others perceive him.",
  "mood": "stressed and withdrawn",
  "emotions": ["anxious", "frustrated", "lonely"],
  "resistance_cooperation_level": "medium",
  "currently_active_problems": ["academic_pressure", "sleep_problems", "social_anxiety"],
  "why_bringing_these_up_now": "The public criticism at the science fair directly triggered academic pressure and social anxiety, while the lack of sleep has made him more vulnerable and prompted him to seek support today."
}
